ssh.title: SSH Connection
ssh.authHint: Auth tries ssh-agent first, then the key file/passphrase, then a password. No credentials are stored.
ssh.credentialsHint: Used for this connection only — never saved.
ssh.injectIntegrationHint: Injects a lightweight script for cwd / command boundaries / agent detection. bash/zsh only; silently ignored if unsupported.
ssh.hostKey.title: Verify host key
ssh.hostKey.body: The authenticity of host {{host}} can't be established. Confirm the key fingerprint before trusting it.
ssh.hostKey.hint: Accept only if this fingerprint matches what you expect for this server. Accepting saves it to known_hosts.
settings.title: Settings
settings.workflows.title: Command workflows
settings.workflows.hint: Saved command templates with {{params}} you fill in, runnable from the command palette (⌘K).
settings.appearance.bell_notification.hi: When the window is in the background, a terminal bell or agent completion will bounce the Dock icon
settings.appearance.clipboard_write.hint: Off by default; when enabled, terminal programs can write to the system clipboard
settings.appearance.inline_images.hint: Render SIXEL / iTerm inline images in the terminal (e.g. icat, plots). Applies to new terminals.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy
settings.privacy.hint: If folder access is denied, grant or revoke it from System Settings.
settings.appearance.terminal_theme.hint: Affects the terminal area only, not the app theme
settings.cli.not_on_path: Not found on the current app PATH
palette.toast.other_running_need_confirm: Other running sessions need another confirmation
diff.title: Changes
explorer.search_remote_unavailable: Remote search is not available yet
inspector.remote_hint: Browse files after connecting the remote session…
notes.placeholder: Keep a tiny project log here. Plans, gotchas, TODOs, commit notes, rubber-duck thoughts...
notes.template.bug.block:
### Bug hunt
- Symptom:
- Repro:
- Suspect:
- Next experiment:
notes.template.bug.label: Bug hunt
notes.template.commit.block:
### Commit check
- [ ] Review diff
- [ ] Run tests
- [ ] Update docs or notes
notes.template.commit.label: Commit check
notes.template.daily.label: Daily log
notes.template.duck.block:
### Rubber duck
- What did I expect?
- What happened?
- Smallest next step:
notes.template.duck.label: Duck mode
overview.duck.title: Tiny nudge
overview.nudge.0: Explain the current problem out loud once. If it sounds fuzzy, shrink the next step.
overview.nudge.1: Before another big command, copy the error line and the file path into notes.
overview.nudge.2: Check the diff from the user’s point of view. The bug often hides in the boring edge case.
overview.nudge.3: Run the narrowest test you can. Big test suites make tiny mistakes wear a trench coat.
overview.nudge.4: Make one reversible change, then look at the output again.
overview.nudge.5: If the terminal feels cursed, open a fresh pane and rerun only the smallest repro.
settings.workflows.starters_hint: Add a small toolkit for review, tests, TODO scanning, large file checks, and busy ports.
Show branch and short working tree status.
settings.workflows.starter.test.name: Run tests
settings.workflows.starter.test.descript: Try pnpm, npm, then yarn test.
settings.workflows.starter.todo_scan.des: Find TODO and FIXME markers in source files.
settings.workflows.starter.large_files.d: List files above 5 MB outside common build folders.
settings.workflows.starter.ports.name: Listening ports
settings.workflows.starter.ports.descrip: Show local TCP listeners that may block dev servers.
workspace.intensity_hint: Estimated from running sessions, agents, unread output, remote connections, and Git changes.
workspace.quest.check_remote: Check files or output for {{count}} remote sessions.
workspace.quest.enjoy_calm: The workspace is calm. Take a sip of water and start the next round.
workspace.quest.hint: A tiny checklist that helps you pick the next move.
workspace.quest.title: Focus Quest
workspace.quest.watch_agents: Let {{count}} agents finish, then inspect the result.
workspace.signal.agents_running.body: {{count}} agents are processing tasks. Review changes when they finish.
workspace.signal.agents_running.title: Agents are working
workspace.signal.calm.body: No obvious backlog. Start a new task or wrap up with confidence.
workspace.signal.calm.title: Everything looks tidy
workspace.signal.cleanup_finished.body: {{count}} completed sessions have been around for a while. Close them to keep the sidebar tidy.
workspace.signal.cleanup_finished.title: Finished sessions can be cleaned
workspace.signal.remote_sessions.body: {{count}} SSH sessions are online. Remote file browsing is ready.
workspace.signal.remote_sessions.title: Remote connections online
workspace.signal.review_changes.body: {{count}} sessions have worktree changes. Take one more look before committing.
workspace.signal.review_changes.title: Changes need review
workspace.signal.unread_sessions.body: {{count}} sessions have new output. It may include completion notes or errors.
workspace.signal.unread_sessions.title: Unread output
workspace.subtitle: Today’s workspace codename: {{name}}
workspace.title: Workspace Radar
workspace.toast.cleanup.title: Finished sessions cleaned
workspace.toast.copied.body: Paste it into an issue, PR, or note.
workspace.toast.copied.title: Digest copied

workspace.toast.focus.title: Focus mode enabled

split.handle.horizontal: Drag to adjust left/right split ratio (arrow keys, Shift+arrow for larger steps, Home/End for extremes, Enter to center)
split.handle.vertical: Drag to adjust top/bottom split ratio (arrow keys, Shift+arrow for larger steps, Home/End for extremes, Enter to center)

quick_select.empty.body: No URL, file location, or copyable marker found in nearby output

quick_select.copy_failed.title: Copy failed
quick_select.open_failed.title: Open failed
paste.warning.message: About to paste {{summary}} text. Multi-line or large pastes may execute commands immediately or make the terminal briefly unresponsive. Continue?
